description_long: This object is a small, elongated loaf of bread with a smooth, slightly glossy brown crust. The surface features subtle diagonal scoring marks, giving it a rustic appearance. The bread is unsliced and appears to have a dense, compact structure, typical of a baguette or similar style loaf. Its color is a uniform medium brown, with some lighter highlights reflecting off the surface. The crust looks firm but not overly hard, and there are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative toppings. The overall shape is gently curved and tapers slightly at the ends.
description: A small, unsliced brown loaf of bread with a smooth, slightly glossy crust and subtle diagonal scoring. The surface is firm and rustic, with a compact, elongated shape.
description_view_0: The bread is seen from the end, showing its rounded tip and the gentle curve of the loaf.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the loaf, highlighting the smooth, slightly flattened surface and subtle scoring.
description_view_2: Another end view, similar to view 0, showing the rounded tip and compact form.
description_view_3: A direct side view displays the entire length and curvature, with the scoring marks more visible along the top.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a smooth, slightly glossy finish with subtle diagonal scoring marks along the top. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or other decorative elements visible.
